description:
The README 'Task File Schema' table lists 18 fields; the Task struct in src/task.rs has 24. Missing from the table: repo, delivered_repo, sync_status, synced_at, target_branch, extra. Of these, repo and delivered_repo appear nowhere in the README at all (only in SKILL.md); synced_at, sync_status, target_branch, and extra are described in README prose but absent from the canonical schema table.

The schema table is presented as the authoritative description of a task JSON file -- it must enumerate every field. Refresh both the table and the example JSON block so they match src/task.rs. Independent of the federated SPEC work.

Audited 2026-05-20.
title: README: refresh the Task File Schema table
